channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: JIMDB - Tue Jun 30 16:00:27 UTC 2026
item.description:
JIMDB is a JetBrains IDE plugin for browsing and managing JD.com JIMDB, a Redis-compatible key-value store, directly inside your IDE. 连接京东 JIMDB（Redis 兼容 KV 存储）的 IDEA...
vendor: yanglikun downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.jd.jimdb

item.title: CLI Shortcut - Sun Jun 28 07:19:03 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: CLI Shortcut downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.onblog.idea-cli-shortcut

item.title: JSONL Viewer - Tue Jun 30 12:42:51 UTC 2026
item.description:
A fast viewer for JSON Lines files (.jsonl / .ndjson), built for files that are far too large for the normal editor. Opening a .jsonl file adds a Records tab that...
vendor: pr0skilled downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.jsonlviewer

item.title: go-doc - Mon Jun 29 19:56:42 UTC 2026
item.description:
go-doc adds typed Go template support to GoLand for .gohtml, .tmpl, and .html files. It runs the shared go-doc language server and provides: contract-aware completions...
